title: CycleGAN
summary: CycleGAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with GAN Variants (WGAN, LSGAN, BEGAN, EBGAN, SNGAN, RaGAN, CycleGAN, StyleGAN) and WGAN.
